native_name: เมี่ยน (เย้า)
textile_history: Mien textiles are distinguished by intricate red embroidery on indigo-dyed cloth, often featuring Chinese-inspired motifs adapted through Mien cultural lenses. The iconic tall red hat is a Mien signature.
cultural_significance: Mien embroidery tells the story of their ancient kingdom and migration. The 'cross of the ancestors' motif appears on ceremonial garments worn during Taoist-influenced rituals.
